name: naruto-sample-scraper
description: Monitors 4 Japanese flea market platforms for Naruto Narutimate Data Carddas SAMPLE cards and alerts via Telegram.

scripts.reset: rm -f seen.json && echo 'seen.json wiped — next run alerts everything'
scripts.deploy: VPS=user@your-vps-ip; ssh $VPS 'cd ~/naruto && git pull && npm install && pm2 restart naruto'
